articles.title: Cape Cod’s Sundae School to offer 76-cent ice cream scoops
articles.description:
The beloved Cape Cod ice cream shop will celebrate 50 years with the limited-time anniversary deal on June 14.

The post Cape Cod’s Sundae School to offer 76-cent ice cream scoops appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Sundae School in Cape Cod celebrates 50 years with 76-cent ice cream scoops on June 14.
Boston residents can enjoy this limited-time offer to commemorate the iconic ice cream shop.
The anniversary deal encourages local families to visit and support a beloved Cape Cod business.

articles.title: July 4th fireworks cancellation sparks intense pushback in Rutland
articles.description:
Rutland officials said that the rejection of a tax override forced them to cancel the annual fireworks show, parade, and concert.

The post July 4th fireworks cancellation sparks intense pushback in Rutland appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Rutland cancels July 4th fireworks, parade, and concert due to tax override rejection.
Local officials cite community pushback following the decision to cancel the annual event.
Residents express disappointment over loss of traditional celebrations in Rutland.

articles.title: 2 teen girls arrested after Boston police allegedly find multiple firearms, drugs, and a knife in vehicle
articles.description:
Authorities recovered three bags of a substance believed to be cocaine.

The post 2 teen girls arrested after Boston police allegedly find multiple firearms, drugs, and a knife in vehicle appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Two teenage girls were arrested in Boston for possessing multiple firearms and drugs.
Authorities found three bags of suspected cocaine in their vehicle.
This incident raises concerns about youth involvement in gun violence and drug-related crime.

articles.title: T pushing new PSA after fatal escalator incident
articles.description:
The MBTA is raising awareness of escalator emergency stop buttons after a Boston man was fatally injured in a freak accident at Davis Station in February.

The post T pushing new PSA after fatal escalator incident appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: MBTA promotes escalator emergency stop buttons following February fatality at Davis Station.
A Boston man was killed in a freak escalator accident, raising safety concerns.
New PSA aims to enhance public awareness and prevent future escalator incidents.

articles.title: A 3BR cabin-style home near the Berkshires — can you guess the price?
articles.description:

Local residents may find increased interest in nearby real estate and tourism.

articles.title: Hawaii police search for man wanted in connection with 3 killings in 2 days
articles.description:
Hawaii Police Chief Reed Mahuna said authorities were deploying “significant resources and personnel” in trying to find Jacob Baker, of Pahoa, Hawaii.

The post Hawaii police search for man wanted in connection with 3 killings in 2 days appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Hawaii police seek Jacob Baker, linked to three killings in two days.
Police Chief Reed Mahuna reports significant resources deployed for the search.
Boston residents should stay informed about potential safety concerns from ongoing investigations.

articles.title: Mass. photographer stabbed in ‘unprovoked attack’ while shooting wedding in Maine
articles.description:
The 26-year-old suffered two lacerations and underwent emergency surgery.

The post Mass. photographer stabbed in ‘unprovoked attack’ while shooting wedding in Maine appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Massachusetts photographer, 26, was stabbed during a wedding shoot in Maine.

Incident raises safety concerns for local photographers working in public spaces.

articles.title: Conan O’Brien inspires grads, rips Trump administration at 2026 Harvard commencement
articles.description:
Conan O'Brien blended humor, humility, and pointed commentary in a speech at the 2026 Harvard commencement ceremony on Thursday.

The post Conan O’Brien inspires grads, rips Trump administration at 2026 Harvard commencement appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Conan O'Brien delivered a commencement speech at Harvard on May 28, 2026.
He criticized the Trump administration, addressing political issues relevant to graduates.
His remarks aimed to inspire Boston's youth to engage in civic responsibility.

articles.title: Healey issues new ICE guidance for schools, hospitals, and places of worship
articles.description:
"The relationship between the state and federal government used to work, but that’s completely broken right now," Gov. Maura Healey said.

The post Healey issues new ICE guidance for schools, hospitals, and places of worship appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Governor Maura Healey issued new ICE guidance affecting schools, hospitals, and places of worship.
Healey criticized the broken relationship between state and federal governments regarding immigration enforcement.
New guidelines aim to protect vulnerable communities in Boston from federal immigration actions.
